whyUs.sectionSubtitle: We don't just build software — we build partnerships

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: Every solution we build is designed to grow with your business. From startup MVP to enterprise-grade systems.

items.title: Experienced Team
items.description: Our engineers bring 5+ years of industry experience across fintech, healthcare, e-commerce, and more.

items.title: Security First
items.description: We implement industry-standard security practices from day one. Your data and your users are always protected.

items.title: Long-Term Partnership
items.description: We're not just vendors — we're your technology partners. Ongoing support, maintenance, and strategic guidance.

portfolio.sectionSubtitle: Real solutions delivering real results for our clients

items.title: FinPay — Digital Banking Platform
items.description: A comprehensive mobile banking solution with real-time transactions, card management, and AI-powered spending insights. Serving 50K+ active users.
items.problem: Legacy banking systems couldn't support modern digital experiences.
items.solution: Built a cloud-native microservices platform with real-time processing.
items.result: 3x increase in digital transactions, 40% reduction in operational costs.

items.title: ShopFlow — E-Commerce Analytics
items.description: An intelligent e-commerce analytics dashboard providing real-time sales tracking, inventory management, and predictive demand forecasting.
items.problem: Merchants lacked visibility into cross-channel sales performance.
items.solution: Developed a unified analytics platform with ML-driven predictions.
items.result: 25% improvement in inventory efficiency, 2x faster decision-making.

items.title: MedConnect — Patient Management
items.description: A HIPAA-compliant patient management system with appointment scheduling, electronic health records, and telemedicine integration.
items.problem: Clinics struggled with fragmented patient data across systems.
items.solution: Created a unified platform connecting all touchpoints of patient care.
items.result: 60% reduction in administrative workload, improved patient outcomes.

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Trusted by businesses across Southeast Asia

items.name: Ahmad Ridwan
items.message: Frogobox transformed our legacy banking infrastructure into a modern, scalable platform. Their technical expertise and commitment to quality exceeded our expectations.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.message: Working with Frogobox felt like having an in-house engineering team. They understood our vision from day one and delivered a product that our merchants absolutely love.

items.name: Dr. Budi Santoso
items.message: The patient management system Frogobox built has revolutionized how we operate. Our staff saves hours every day, and patient satisfaction has never been higher.

items.name: Lisa Pratama
items.message: Frogobox's DevOps consulting helped us achieve 99.9% uptime and cut our deployment time from days to minutes. A true game-changer for our engineering team.
